SearchRecord.title: Search Record
SearchRecord.description: A record of a medicine search performed by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the search.

medicineName.description: The name of the identified medicine.

composition.description: The salt composition of the medicine.

alternativesCount.description: The number of generic alternatives found.

fullResult.description: The complete JSON response from the Gemini API.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the search was saved.

/searches/{searchId}.description: Collection of medicine search history records.
